site.name: For You Support Co-ordination
site.description: Professional NDIS Support Coordination services helping participants connect with the right providers and achieve their goals.

hero.title: Your Journey, Our Support
hero.subtitle: We help NDIS participants navigate their plans, connect with the right providers, and build the life they choose. Personalised support coordination that puts you first.

about.title: Dedicated to Empowering Your NDIS Journey
about.description: At For You Support Co-ordination, we believe everyone deserves the opportunity to live their best life. Our experienced team works alongside NDIS participants to understand their unique goals, navigate the complexities of the NDIS, and connect them with quality services and supports.

features.title: Person-Centred Approach
features.description: Every plan is tailored to your individual goals, preferences, and circumstances.

features.title: Strong Provider Network
features.description: We connect you with trusted, quality service providers across all support categories.

features.title: Ongoing Communication
features.description: We keep you informed every step of the way with regular check-ins and transparent updates.

services.title: Support Coordination
services.description: We help you understand and implement your NDIS plan, ensuring you get the most out of your funding and connect with the right supports.

services.title: Specialist Support Coordination
services.description: For participants with complex needs, we provide specialised coordination to manage challenges and ensure consistent, high-quality care.

services.title: Housing & Accommodation
services.description: We assist with finding suitable housing options including SDA, SIL, and other supported living arrangements tailored to your needs.

services.title: Provider Connections
services.description: Leverage our extensive network of trusted NDIS providers to find the best match for your therapy, daily living, and community needs.

services.title: Plan Management Support
services.description: We work alongside your plan manager to track budgets, monitor spending, and ensure your funding is used effectively throughout the year.

services.title: Capacity Building
services.description: We empower you to build skills and confidence to manage your own supports over time, promoting independence and self-advocacy.

team.name: Sarah Mitchell
team.bio: Over 12 years of experience in disability services and a passion for person-centred care.

team.name: James Chen
team.bio: Specialises in complex needs coordination with a background in allied health management.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: Qualified social worker dedicated to empowering participants to achieve their goals.

testimonials.text: For You Support completely changed how I experience the NDIS. They listened to what I actually needed and connected me with amazing providers. I finally feel in control of my plan.
testimonials.author: Michael R.

testimonials.text: As a parent of a child with a disability, navigating the NDIS was overwhelming. The team at For You Support made it simple and stress-free. They genuinely care about our family.
testimonials.author: Lisa T.

testimonials.text: Professional, responsive, and always available when I need them. They helped me find the right housing and daily supports. I could not recommend them more highly.
testimonials.author: David K.
